'''zhathaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kynureninase|kynureninase]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kynureninase|kynureninase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhathaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæthæyæth|zhæthæyæth]] || [[word:zhæthæyæj|zhæthæyæj]] || [[word:zhæthæyæsh|zhæthæyæsh]] || [[word:zhæthæyæ|zhæthæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhathathayath|zhathathayath]] || [[word:zhathathayaj|zhathathayaj]] || [[word:zhathathayash|zhathathayash]] || [[word:zhathathaya|zhathathaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhathayath|zhathayath]] || [[word:zhathayaj|zhathayaj]] || [[word:zhathayash|zhathayash]] || [[word:zhathaya|zhathaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhathafyath|zhathafyath]] || [[word:zhathafyaj|zhathafyaj]] || [[word:zhathafyash|zhathafyash]] || [[word:zhathafyaf|zhathafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhathayatha|zhathayatha]] || [[word:zhathayaja|zhathayaja]] || [[word:zhathayasha|zhathayasha]] || [[word:zhathayaka|zhathayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhathayath|zhathayath]] || [[word:zhathayaj|zhathayaj]] || [[word:zhathayash|zhathayash]] || [[word:zhathaya|zhathaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhathayathal|zhathayathal]] || [[word:zhathayajal|zhathayajal]] || [[word:zhathayashal|zhathayashal]] || [[word:zhathayakal|zhathayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhathayathatha|zhathayathatha]] || [[word:zhathayajaja|zhathayajaja]] || [[word:zhathayashasha|zhathayashasha]] || [[word:zhathayaka|zhathayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhathayathan|zhathayathan]] || [[word:zhathayajan|zhathayajan]] || [[word:zhathayashan|zhathayashan]] || [[word:zhathayakan|zhathayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhathayathaoro|zhathayathaoro]] || [[word:zhathayajaoro|zhathayajaoro]] || [[word:zhathayashaoro|zhathayashaoro]] || [[word:zhathayakaoro|zhathayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
